    label(PvP) To kill someone (6-0)
    title(PvP) Your first player kill
    addedEnemies[]
    majorTypepvpChain
    descriptionShoot down another player! You can turn hostile by clicking on the "Skull icon" in the middle of the main UI bar. This can only be done inside a "Safe-Zone" in all systems as long as your level is not too high.
